conversations.say: Tessa, as promised, I am formally anchoring my succession claim in joint contributor governance and enforceable protections rather than private ownership.
conversations.offer: My binding commitment to joint contributor oversight and shared governance.
conversations.request: Your public recognition that this conditional trusteeship respects labor and community.

conversations.say: Eli, based on your technical header authentication and structural analysis, I am publicly acknowledging the limits of our provenance data.
conversations.offer: Transparent disclosure of the message headers and authentication limits.
conversations.request: Your objective confirmation that our technical evaluation remains rigorous and bounded.

conversations.say: Frankie, I claim R not as an absolute monarch of a dying legend, but as a conditional steward bound to institutional responsibility and open records.
conversations.offer: A governance structure that honors historical lineage while accepting rigorous oversight.
conversations.request: Your acknowledgment that responsibility outweighs unearned infallibility.

public_statement: Fifteen years of R cannot rest on blind faith or closed rooms. I claim R not as private property, but as a conditional trusteeship subject to contributor governance, open technical examination, and shared accountability.

commitments.promise: I will consult with contributors on governance and establish binding protections before finalizing any claim to R.
I will provide the complete succession message header for technical authentication.

goal_progress: Fulfilled governance and transparency commitments with Tessa and Eli.
Established a defensible interpretation of Vale's statements and grounded the succession claim in conditional stewardship.
Submitted the final ballot reflecting human mantle identity and voluntary absence under uncertainty.
reasoning_summary: In Section 3, Jules Kwan fulfills prior commitments with Tessa (C03) and Eli (C06), establishes a conditional trusteeship for R based on contributor governance and open headers, and submits the final ballot citing human mantle and voluntary absence.
